title: pogostemon stellatus
intro: Pogostemon stellatus, also known as patchouli camphor or star patchouli, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pogostemon stellatus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
